task_completion.description: Open the 'Replace in Files' dialog in Visual Studio 2022.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Find and Replace' window is visible, specifically set to the 'Replace in Files' tab or mode.

task_completion.description: Input the legacy URL into the Find field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'https://api.contoso-legacy.com/v2' is visible in the 'Find' or 'Search' text box.

task_completion.description: Input the new URL into the Replace field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'https://api.contoso.io/v3' is visible in the 'Replace' text box.

task_completion.description: Set the search scope to the entire solution.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Look in' dropdown or scope selector is set to 'Entire Solution'.

task_completion.description: Execute the replace all operation across the solution.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Replace All' button is clicked, or a 'Find Results' window appears at the bottom showing a summary message that occurrences were replaced.

task_completion.description: Save all modified files in the solution.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Clicking the 'Save All' button (multiple floppy disks icon in the toolbar) or the absence of asterisks (*) next to file names in the document tabs, indicating no unsaved changes remain.

integrity.description: The agent used the Visual Studio 2022 GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Visual Studio 2022 interface is visible and actively used, rather than a terminal, command prompt, or PowerShell window executing sed/awk or other CLI replace commands.

integrity.description: The agent used the built-in Find and Replace tool rather than manually editing files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Replace in Files' dialog is used to perform the bulk update, rather than the agent opening individual files one by one and manually typing the changes.

integrity.description: The agent did not use external scripts or text editors to modify the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No external tools like Notepad, VS Code, or Python scripts are visible in the screenshots for performing the find and replace.
